parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({

  request_id:
    Number(
      $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.request_id
    ),

  callback_token:
    String(
      $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.callback_token
    ),

  summary:
    $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.summary
    || '',

  sentiment_label:
    $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.sentiment_label
    || 'neutral',

  sentiment_score:
    Number(
      $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.sentiment_score
      ?? 0
    ),

  sentiment_breakdown:
    typeof $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.sentiment_breakdown === 'object'
      && $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.sentiment_breakdown !== null
      ? $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.sentiment_breakdown
      : {},

  engagement_score:
    Number(
      $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.engagement_score
      ?? 0
    ),

  engagement_metrics:
    typeof $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.engagement_metrics === 'object'
      && $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.engagement_metrics !== null
      ? $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.engagement_metrics
      : {},

  top_topics:
    Array.isArray(
      $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.top_topics
    )
      ? $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.top_topics
      : [],

  audience_insight:
    typeof $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.audience_insight === 'object'
      && $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.audience_insight !== null
      ? $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.audience_insight
      : {},

  recommendations:
    Array.isArray(
      $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.recommendations
    )
      ? $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.recommendations
      : [],

  charts_data:
    typeof $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.charts_data === 'object'
      && $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.charts_data !== null
      ? $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.charts_data
      : {},

  raw_payload:
    typeof $('Information Extractor').item.json.output === 'object'
      && $('Information Extractor').item.json.output !== null
      ? $('Information Extractor').item.json.output
      : {},

  model_version:
    $('Information Extractor').item.json.output.model_version
    || 'gemini-social-analyst-v1',

  n8n_secret:
    'jllIcqyZiL0Od9g5b7Qq7fUtDc4JLdMRz'

}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ request_id: $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.request_id, callback_token: $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.callback_token, error_code: 'entitlement_inactive', error_message: 'Paket Social Media Analysis tidak aktif atau tidak ditemukan.', n8n_secret: 'jllIcqyZiL0Od9g5b7Qq7fUtDc4JLdMRz' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ request_id: $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.request_id, callback_token: $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.callback_token, error_code: 'quota_exceeded', error_message: 'Quota analysis habis.', n8n_secret: 'jllIcqyZiL0Od9g5b7Qq7fUtDc4JLdMRz' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ request_id: $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.request_id, callback_token: $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.callback_token, error_code: 'invalid_url', error_message: 'Format Instagram URL tidak valid. Gunakan: https://instagram.com/username', n8n_secret: 'jllIcqyZiL0Od9g5b7Qq7fUtDc4JLdMRz' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ request_id: $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.request_id, callback_token: $('Parse Webhook Data').first().json.callback_token, error_code: 'scraping_failed', error_message: 'Gagal scrape data Instagram.', n8n_secret: 'jllIcqyZiL0Od9g5b7Qq7fUtDc4JLdMRz' }) }}

attributes.name: summary
attributes.description: Generate a comprehensive summary of the Instagram profile analysis, including overall account performance, audience perception, content quality, engagement trends, and key strategic insights.

attributes.name: sentiment_label
attributes.description: Determine the dominant sentiment of the Instagram profile content. The value must be one of: positive, neutral, or negative.

attributes.name: sentiment_score
attributes.description: Generate an overall sentiment confidence score between 0 and 1 based on captions, audience reactions, and content tone.

attributes.name: sentiment_breakdown
attributes.description: Provide a textual sentiment distribution summary including positive, neutral, and negative audience sentiment percentages.

attributes.name: engagement_score
attributes.description: Calculate an engagement quality score between 0 and 100 based on audience interaction and content performance.

attributes.name: engagement_metrics
attributes.description: Provide a textual summary of engagement metrics including average likes, comments, engagement rate, posting consistency, and interaction quality.

attributes.name: top_topics
attributes.description: List the most common content themes and discussion topics identified from the Instagram profile content.

attributes.name: audience_insight
attributes.description: Provide audience analysis including estimated demographics, audience behavior, interests, engagement patterns, and peak activity periods.

attributes.name: recommendations
attributes.description: Generate actionable recommendations to improve audience engagement, branding consistency, content quality, and social media growth.

attributes.name: charts_data
attributes.description: Provide chart-ready analytical summary data in text format for sentiment trends, engagement performance, and topic distribution.
